ksa_text: Knowledge of data classification, cataloging, and metadata management systems, including automated data discovery, business glossary integration, metadata standards, and the role of metadata in enabling governance and self-service consumption.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: knowledge from Data Architecture (domain affinity 0.60); strategic/governance framing outweighs technical signals. STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.4126). A working DE would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
